name: click-click
description: Click Click — Everyone's 1st Agent. Cross-platform screen buddy: guides, assists (confirm-gated), and reasons via BYO-key LLM providers.

scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test

comments.note: Phase-1 scaffold. node-addon-api, ws, ps-list, puppeteer-core are added at the slice that first needs them (see specs/click-click.plan.md §5 pinned deps). Slice 1.6 adds express (gateway) + supertest (dev, gateway HTTP tests). Slice 1.4 adds electron (dev, overlay shell) + jsdom (dev, renderer DOM test). The pure-logic + jsdom core stays Electron-free in CI; the live Electron window is validated manually per docs/demo-P1.md.
